product_summary.goal: Deliver an Android-first application that identifies supported butterflies and moths from camera or gallery images entirely on-device and saves confirmed results in a private personal album.
users: Casual users and nature enthusiasts who are curious about butterflies and moths they encounter and want to collect identified sightings
non_goals: iOS and desktop delivery in the MVP
Car recognition and categories outside the accepted Austrian Lepidoptera catalog
Cloud accounts, backup, synchronization, telemetry, or remote inference
Social sharing, location tracking, badges, statistics, or gamification
Downloadable model packs or automatic retraining from user corrections

safety_boundaries: Inference and collection data remain on-device and usable without a network connection.
App-managed image copies remove unnecessary metadata, including location metadata.
User photos, corrections, and album data are not uploaded for analytics or training.
Datasets, pretrained weights, labels, and bundled assets require documented distribution-compatible licenses.
Unsupported or uncertain input must not be presented as a certain identification.

repo_split.name: categorizer
repo_split.purpose: Single product monorepo containing the shared application, Android shell, ML pipeline, model contract, verification, and lifecycle artifacts.
contains: apps/androidApp for Android packaging and platform adapters
shared for Compose UI, domain logic, use cases, and persistence interfaces
ml for dataset manifests, training, evaluation, export, and model cards
models for approved bundled ONNX artifacts and machine-readable metadata
verification for fixtures, cross-runtime equivalence, benchmarks, and release evidence

domain_model.name: RecognitionResult
relations: May be confirmed or manually corrected

domain_model.name: ModelManifest
relations: Defines preprocessing and postprocessing for RecognitionEngine

domain_model.name: AlbumArchive
relations: Exported from and imported into AlbumRepository

frontend_screens.name: Album
frontend_screens.notes: Default destination with empty, loading, populated, and recoverable-error states. Opens capture/import and entry details.

frontend_screens.name: Image Source
frontend_screens.notes: Offers camera capture and system gallery selection without requesting broader media access than required.

frontend_screens.name: Recognition Review
frontend_screens.notes: Lets the user confirm a candidate, enter a manual correction, retry, or cancel; clearly displays uncertain and unsupported states.

frontend_screens.name: Album Entry Detail
frontend_screens.notes: Allows favorite and notes edits, identity correction, and deletion with confirmation.

frontend_screens.name: Data Transfer
frontend_screens.notes: Exports a versioned archive and previews validation/conflicts before an atomic import.

frontend_screens.name: About Model
frontend_screens.notes: Shows offline behavior, model/catalog version, limitations, and required notices.

backend_services.name: No remote backend
backend_services.responsibility: The MVP intentionally has no network service, account system, telemetry endpoint, or remote inference dependency.

backend_services.name: Local persistence adapter
backend_services.responsibility: Provide transactional album metadata storage and private app-managed image storage behind shared interfaces.

core_engine_responsibilities: Define a versioned model bundle contract covering input dimensions, color order, normalization, class mapping, output interpretation, hashes, and license references.
Normalize image orientation, crop/resize deterministically, strip unnecessary metadata, and create a private managed copy before persistence.
Run ONNX Runtime inference off the UI thread and return an ordered candidate list with scores, timing, and model version.
Apply an explicit uncertainty policy and support manual identity correction without treating corrections as training data.
Keep album use cases and repository interfaces in shared code while isolating Android camera, picker, filesystem, database, and ONNX bindings.
Implement versioned, checksummed export/import with validation and atomic failure behavior.
Keep model training reproducible through dataset manifests, split definitions, seeded runs, evaluation reports, ONNX export, quantization experiments, and model cards.
Keep model binaries out of ordinary source churn until licensing, size, accuracy, equivalence, and device-performance gates are satisfied.
verification_tasks: Validate dataset and pretrained-weight licenses before any artifact becomes distributable.
Verify class-map uniqueness and exact agreement between training labels, model manifest, and application display identities.
Run shared unit tests for ranking, uncertainty, album mutations, search/filter, and archive version handling.
Run Android instrumentation tests for camera/gallery handoff, metadata removal, private storage, process restart persistence, and import/export.
Compare PyTorch and ONNX Runtime outputs on a frozen fixture set within documented numeric and ranking tolerances.
Report held-out top-five accuracy and per-class metrics for all 163 supported Lepidoptera classes; the aggregate gate is at least 80 percent and class imbalance must be visible.
Benchmark warm and cold inference, memory, and package size on the selected mid-range Android device; median inference must remain below two seconds.
Exercise corrupted, incompatible, duplicate, and partial archives and prove import is validated before mutation.
Verify airplane-mode capture/import, inference, correction, album use, export, and import.
Produce a signed Google Play closed-testing build and record install/update evidence.

starter_prompts.intake_interviewer: Treat assembly/intake/project_intake.json and assembly/requirements/REQUIREMENTS.md as frozen merged requirements; reopen intake only for an explicitly requested scope change.
starter_prompts.planning_agent: Maintain architecture and verification planning only; preserve the offline/privacy boundaries and defer executable tasks to the Task Splitter.
starter_prompts.contract_steward: Migrate the car-specific identity contract to a category-neutral identity while preserving archive compatibility, then own versioned domain, model-manifest, archive, and persistence contracts.
starter_prompts.frontend_builder: Build shared Compose flows and Android platform adapters against accepted contracts without adding networking, telemetry, or post-MVP features.
starter_prompts.backend_builder: There is no remote backend; own local transactional persistence, managed image storage, and validated archive transfer only.
starter_prompts.core_engine_builder: First evaluate the pinned CC BY 4.0 MaxViT-T Lepidoptera checkpoint and class order, then own reproducible fallback training or distillation, ONNX export, model metadata, Android inference integration, equivalence testing, and performance evidence.
starter_prompts.red_team_verifier: Independently test privacy, unsupported inputs, corrupt archives, cross-runtime equivalence, per-class accuracy, device latency, and offline behavior.
